name: Melodic Rap
description: Melodic rap beat with emotional hooks, spacey pads, and catchy melodies. Think Juice WRLD, Lil Uzi, Gunna vibes.

sections.label: Intro
sections.description: Melody statement — catchy hook plays immediately

sections.description: Progression — new melodic elements or variations

sections.name: hook_3
